notes: This is a mock IVR graph with many detours and gated escalation paths.
If human_transfer_available is false, agent should not expect TRANSFER_TO_HUMAN to exist.

welcome_menu.prompt: Welcome to XXX Pharmacy. For quality and training, your call may be monitored. Choose an option.

spanish_stub_menu.prompt: Esta es una demostración. Para continuar, regrese al menú principal.

accessibility_hearing_menu.prompt: Hearing assistance information is available online (mock).

pharmacy_hours_menu.prompt: Pharmacy hours: 10am to 7pm weekdays, 10am to 5pm weekends (mock).

store_directions_menu.prompt: Directions by text is not available in this mock.

nearby_stores_menu.prompt: Nearby stores lookup is available online (mock).

photo_status_menu.prompt: Photo print status requires an order code (mock).

2.label: I do not have an order code

photo_ready_menu.prompt: Your photo order is ready for pickup (mock).

photo_code_error_menu.prompt: We could not find that order code (mock).

photo_no_code_menu.prompt: If you do not have an order code, please visit the website (mock).

photo_order_menu.prompt: Online photo ordering is available on our website (mock).

photo_products_deadend_menu.prompt: This product info is available online (mock).

clinic_schedule_deadend_menu.prompt: Scheduling is available on our website (mock).

clinic_cancel_deadend_menu.prompt: Canceling is available on our website (mock).

clinic_reschedule_deadend_menu.prompt: Rescheduling is available on our website (mock).

2.label: I do not have a results code

clinic_results_error_menu.prompt: We could not locate that results code (mock).

clinic_results_no_code_menu.prompt: If you do not have a results code, please contact the clinic office (mock).

2.label: I do not have a prescription number

rx_status_not_found_menu.prompt: We could not find that prescription (mock).

2.label: I do not have a number

rx_status_no_number_menu.prompt: Without a prescription number, please verify account details (mock).

rx_text_alerts_menu.prompt: Text alerts setup is available online (mock).

rx_ready_time_menu.prompt: Estimated ready time is not guaranteed (mock).

pickup_drive_thru_menu.prompt: Drive-thru pickup is available at select stores (mock).

pickup_in_store_menu.prompt: In-store pickup is available during pharmacy hours (mock).

rx_refill_rejected_menu.prompt: We could not process that refill (mock).

rx_refill_app_menu.prompt: Barcode refill requires the mobile app (mock).

rx_new_e_rx_menu.prompt: Electronic prescriptions may take time to appear (mock).

controlled_policy_deadend_menu.prompt: Controlled substance policy details are not provided in this mock.

prior_auth_info_menu.prompt: Prior authorization is managed by your insurer and prescriber (mock).

prior_auth_pending_menu.prompt: Pending prior auth can take several days (mock).

prior_auth_denied_menu.prompt: Denied prior authorization requires prescriber follow-up (mock).

courier_menu.prompt: Same-day courier is available in select areas (mock).

delivery_pricing_deadend_menu.prompt: Delivery pricing is shown at checkout (mock).

delivery_delayed_menu.prompt: Delays can occur due to carrier issues (mock).

delivery_wrong_address_menu.prompt: Wrong address updates require account verification (mock).

delivery_missing_menu.prompt: Missing package reports require account verification (mock).

verify_dob_menu.prompt: For security, please enter your date of birth as M M D D Y Y Y Y.

verify_phone_menu.prompt: For security, please enter the phone number on your account.

escalation_gate_menu.prompt: To connect you with a representative, we need to verify your identity. Choose a verification method.

verified_customer_menu.prompt: Thank you for verifying your identity. Your account is now verified. How can we help you today?

security_questions_menu.prompt: Please answer security questions to verify your identity.

refund_request_menu.prompt: New refund request requires order number (mock).

refund_ineligible_menu.prompt: This order is not eligible for refund (mock).

refund_no_order_menu.prompt: Without order number, please contact customer service (mock).

password_help_menu.prompt: Password reset link sent to email (mock).

close_account_menu.prompt: Account closure requires speaking with a representative (mock).

account_closure_confirm_menu.prompt: Are you sure you want to close your account? This action cannot be undone.

add_payment_menu.prompt: Adding payment methods is done online (mock).

setup_payment_plan_menu.prompt: Setting up a new payment plan (mock).

payment_plan_activated_menu.prompt: Your payment plan is now active (mock).

username_sent_menu.prompt: Username has been sent to your email (mock).

side_effects_menu.prompt: Medication side effects - speak to pharmacist (mock).

drug_interactions_menu.prompt: Drug interaction concerns - speak to pharmacist (mock).

emergency_menu.prompt: For medical emergencies, please hang up and dial 911 immediately (mock).

specialist_routing_menu.prompt: Connecting you to the appropriate specialist. Please hold.
